TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Andry Rajoelina Andry Rajoelina (ryax sa 30 na byacing tay 5 squ kawas na 1974 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1974) mrhuw Madagascar ta' misuw hya' ga Andry Rajoelina, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Andry Rajoelina minkahul sa Antsirabe na Madagascar. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1974 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: an*rj rajoelina an*rj rajoelina (rjax s~…ēa ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - mis~…ēuw ), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ma*a…£as~…ē ¶~ ®ar ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a an*rj rajoelina, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral an*rj rajoelina minkańßul s~…ēa ants~…ēiraő≤e na ma*a…£as~…ē ¶~ ®ar. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
